eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Keith, NE; at 12:19 PM ON FEB 27, 2026 Effective until 02:19 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Grass Fire Cedar View Area. Law enforcement is requiring an immediate evacuation of the Cedar View area due to a large grass fire. Please evacuate to the south, east, or west.
